title: bowlesia glandulosa
intro: Bowlesia glandulosa, also known as false bugloss, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Bowlesia glandulosa include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
